ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(PO_Required__c) = "Yes", $RecordType.Name = "New Business", OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(PO_Frequency__c)), ISBLANK(PurchaseOrderReference__c), ISBLANK(PurchaseOrderRequestDate__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter the PO frequency, request date and reference.
